name: web-preview
description: In-app browser panel. Works with any web framework — React, Vue, Next.js, FastAPI, Go, Rails, etc.

configSchema.label: URL
configSchema.description: Full URL to open (any framework, any host). Takes priority over the Port field.

configSchema.label: Port
configSchema.description: Port on the NTC server — host is auto-filled from your connection. Used only when URL above is empty.
